items.title: ‘I felt my spine and body split’: the woman who was hit by a child on a Lime bike – and denied compensation
items.summary: The collision was catastrophic. Jane Ouartsi suffered a fractured collarbone, two spinal fractures, a broken femur that took three operations to fix, and she had to learn to walk again like a baby.

items.title: Why does JD Vance keep saying loony things? | Margaret Sullivan
items.summary: Scratch their surface and you see exactly what he’s trying to do: stand up strong for intolerance and corruptionGiven how impetuous Donald Trump is, his vice-president, JD Vance, strikes some Americans as a more stable alternative.

items.title: “These are better sine waves. They just are”: We meet the people using test equipment to make music
items.summary: Curious about how to make music with raw oscillators and other pieces of exotic Cold War-era test equipment? Don your lab coat and find out how you can incorporate old gear into your own productions. Just beware of high voltage

items.title: Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin
items.summary: The post Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin appeared first on Goldenplec.com Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin on Friday December 19th, 2026 Gurriers, the last diamond to be forged from Ireland’s post-punk scene before the mine collapsed, played two sold-out shows in The Button Factory this week on a landmark occasion for a group who have outgrown their sweaty club origins.

items.title: Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin
items.summary: The post Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin appeared first on Goldenplec.com   Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin on December 18th 2025 One of the most anticipated concerts of the year occurred on an absolutely freezing Thursday night, with Kingfishr taking the stage of the 3arena for the first of their two sold out shows.
